title: Tracer Initialization and Startup Logs
interaction_flow: PHP_Engine → ddtrace_ext: PHP_MINIT_FUNCTION(ddtrace) [extension load]
ddtrace_ext → ddtrace_ext: ddtrace_log_init() — init logging subsystem
ddtrace_ext → ConfigSystem: ddtrace_config_minit(module_number) — load INI + env vars (DD_SERVICE, DD_ENV, DD_VERSION, DD_TRACE_ENABLED, etc.)
ddtrace_ext → ddtrace_ext: dd_disable_if_incompatible_sapi_detected() — optional early exit
ddtrace_ext → ddtrace_ext: ddtrace_autoload_minit() — register PHP class autoloader
ddtrace_ext → ddtrace_ext: register DDTrace classes (SpanData, Integration, SpanEvent, etc.)
ddtrace_ext → IntegrationsRegistry: ddtrace_integrations_minit() — build name-to-integration hash map, install method hooks via zai_hook
ddtrace_ext → ddtrace_ext: ddtrace_serializer_startup(), ddtrace_sidecar_minit(), ddtrace_live_debugger_minit()
PHP_Engine → ddtrace_ext: PHP_RINIT_FUNCTION(ddtrace) [first request]
ddtrace_ext → ddtrace_ext: dd_initialize_request() — init per-request state (span stacks, priority sampling, distributed trace IDs)
ddtrace_ext → StartupLogger: pthread_once → dd_rinit_once() [runs once per process]
dd_rinit_once → StartupLogger: ddtrace_startup_logging_first_rinit()
StartupLogger → StartupLogger: ddtrace_startup_diagnostics(ht, quick=true) — agent connectivity check (cURL), sources_path reachable, open_basedir, excluded modules
StartupLogger → StartupLogger: _dd_print_values_to_log(ht) — emits 'DATADOG TRACER DIAGNOSTICS - key: value' lines to error log
StartupLogger → ConfigSystem: _dd_get_startup_config(ht) — reads all config fields: date, version, lang, env, service, agent_url, enabled, debug, sample_rate, sapi, sidecar, telemetry, etc.
StartupLogger → StartupLogger: _dd_serialize_json(ht, buf) — JSON-encode config+diagnostics
StartupLogger → StartupLogger: LOG 'DATADOG TRACER CONFIGURATION - {JSON}'
dd_rinit_once → ddtrace_ext: ddtrace_coms_init_and_start_writer() — start background trace-sender thread
ddtrace_ext → ddtrace_ext: ddtrace_read_distributed_tracing_ids() — extract W3C/Datadog headers from SAPI
ddtrace_ext → ddtrace_ext: ddtrace_push_root_span() [if DD_TRACE_GENERATE_ROOT_SPAN=true]
GlobalTracer (PHP) → Tracer (PHP): GlobalTracer::get() — lazy singleton: new Tracer() if ddtrace loaded
Tracer (PHP) → Tracer (PHP): __construct($transport=null, $propagators=null, $config=[])
Tracer (PHP) → Transport: new Internal() [default] or NoopTransport [if disabled]
Tracer (PHP) → Tracer (PHP): new TextMap($this) — create text/HTTP header propagators
Tracer (PHP) → ConfigSystem: dd_trace_env_config('DD_VERSION') → $serviceVersion
Tracer (PHP) → ConfigSystem: dd_trace_env_config('DD_ENV') → $environment
Tracer (PHP) → ddtrace_ext: current_context() — read distributed tracing parent from C layer
Tracer (PHP) → ScopeManager: new ScopeManager($rootContext) — init scope stack
Integration (PHP) → ConfigSystem: Integration::shouldLoad($name) → ddtrace_config_integration_enabled($name)
Integration (PHP) → ConfigSystem: handleInternalSpanServiceName() → ddtrace_config_app_name($fallbackName) or dd_trace_env_config('DD_TRACE_REMOVE_INTEGRATION_SERVICE_NAMES_ENABLED')
key_relationships: GlobalTracer depends_on Tracer — singleton holder, calls new Tracer() on first get()
Tracer depends_on Transport — Internal (default) or NoopTransport
Tracer depends_on ScopeManager — manages active span scope stack
Tracer depends_on ConfigSystem — dd_trace_env_config(), ddtrace_config_trace_enabled(), ddtrace_config_app_name()
Tracer depends_on TextMap (Propagator) — inject/extract for TEXT_MAP and HTTP_HEADERS formats
ddtrace_ext (MINIT) depends_on IntegrationsRegistry — ddtrace_integrations_minit() hooks all supported integrations
StartupLogger depends_on ConfigSystem — _dd_get_startup_config() reads all INI/env values
StartupLogger depends_on ddtrace_startup_diagnostics — agent health check + exclusion checks
dd_rinit_once runs_once_per_process via pthread_once — guards startup log emission and writer init
config_fields_in_startup_log: date, os_name, os_version, version (tracer), lang=php, lang_version
agent_url, debug, analytics_enabled, sample_rate, sampling_rules, tags, service_mapping
important_notes: Startup logs are emitted only once per PHP process (pthread_once gate in dd_rinit_once), on first RINIT.
Startup log output format: 'DATADOG TRACER CONFIGURATION - {JSON}' written to PHP error log.
Diagnostics (agent connectivity, sources path) are separate from config; agent check uses cURL POST with X-Datadog-Diagnostic-Check header.
PHP function startup_logs() (DDTrace\startup_logs) calls ddtrace_startup_logging_json() for on-demand retrieval.
ddtrace_config_trace_enabled() checks both ddtrace.disable INI and DD_TRACE_ENABLED env; Tracer::startSpan() and reset() both gate on this.
ddtrace_config_app_name(?string $fallbackName) returns DD_SERVICE or falls back to provided name.
Tracer::noop() returns a fully disabled tracer (NoopTransport + NoopPropagators, enabled=false).
GlobalTracer::get() lazy-creates new Tracer() only if ddtrace extension is loaded; otherwise NoopTracer.
Config is memoized at MINIT before SAPI env vars; first RINIT busts cache to pick up SAPI-level env vars.
conditional_flows: if ddtrace.disable=1 → MINIT returns early, no integrations loaded, no startup logs
if DD_TRACE_GENERATE_ROOT_SPAN=true → ddtrace_push_root_span() called in RINIT
if DD_TRACE_SIDECAR_TRACE_SENDER → skip ddtrace_coms_init_and_start_writer, use sidecar instead
if distributed_tracing_parent present → Tracer creates rootContext SpanContext with parent IDs
